plugin.name: Aardwolf_Marketplace_Miniwindow
plugin.author: Dunnaakr
plugin.purpose: Captures Aardwolf marketplace output into themed miniwindows with clickable actions.
plugin.description:
Aardwolf marketplace miniwindow.
Commands intercepted: lbid market list lbid <num> market bid <num>
Behavior: - Captures market listings into a resizable themed miniwindow - Clicking the item number opens a detail miniwindow - Clicking the last bid sends the next bid tier automatically
Current assumptions in this first draft: - Gold bid increment uses previous bid + max(500, min(5%, 50000)) - Only QP/TP bids append 'confirm' - A trailing * on Last Bid means you are already the current high bidder

muclient.script:
require "wrapped_captures" require "themed_miniwindows"
market_plugin = { list_window = nil, detail_window = nil, last_list_command = "lbid", current_detail_num = nil, rows_by_num = {}, pending_after_list = nil, list_title = "Aardwolf Marketplace", detail_title = "Marketplace Item", list_start_pattern = "^\\s*\\[ Aardwolf Marketplace - Current List of Inventory \\]\\s*$", list_end_pattern = "^Type: 'Lbid <num>' to see stats and 'Lbid <num> <amount>' to bid on an item\\.$", detail_start_pattern = "^\\+[-]+\\+$", detail_end_pattern = "^\\| Current bid\\s+:\\s+.*\\|$", min_increment = 500, max_increment = 50000, percent_increment = 0.05, }
local function trim(value) return (value or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") end
local function line_text(styles) return trim(strip_colours_from_styles(styles or {})) end
local function ensure_capture_available() if Capture and Capture.command then return true end ColourNote("white", "red", "Marketplace window needs Capture.command, but it is not available in this session.") return false end
local function clean_amount(amount_text) local cleaned = ((amount_text or ""):gsub("[,%*]", "")) return tonumber(cleaned) end
local function format_amount(amount) local reversed = tostring(math.floor(amount or 0)):reverse():gsub("(%d%d%d)", "%1,"):reverse() return reversed:gsub("^,", "") end
local function requires_confirm(listing_type, last_bid_text) local typed = (listing_type or ""):upper() return typed:find("QP", 1, true) ~= nil or typed:find("TP", 1, true) ~= nil end
function market_next_bid_amount(last_bid_text, listing_type) local current = clean_amount(last_bid_text) or 0 if current < 1 then current = 1 end
-- First draft assumption: gold-style tiering uses at least 500, -- but caps the 5% step at 50,000. local increment = math.ceil(current * market_plugin.percent_increment) increment = math.min(increment, market_plugin.max_increment) increment = math.max(increment, market_plugin.min_increment)
-- Non-gold listings are still treated with the same tier rule for now -- until we verify a different QP/TP rule from live output/help. if listing_type and listing_type:upper():find("GOLD", 1, true) == nil then increment = math.max(1, increment) end
return current + increment end
local function parse_market_row(raw_line) local num, description, level, listing_type, last_bid, bids, time_left = raw_line:match("^%s*(%d+)%s+(.-)%s+(%d+)%s+([*%a]+)%s+([%d,]+%*?)%s+(%d+)%s+(.+)$")
if not num then return nil end
return { num = num, description = description, level = level, listing_type = listing_type, last_bid = last_bid, bids = bids, time_left = time_left, } end
local function build_row_hyperlinks(raw_line, row) local links = {}
local num_start, num_end = raw_line:find(row.num, 1, true) if num_start and num_end then table.insert( links, { start = num_start, stop = num_end, text = string.format('market_capture_detail(%q)', row.num), label = "Open market item " .. row.num, } ) end
local prefix, last_bid = raw_line:match("^(.-)([%d,]+%*?)%s+%d+%s+[%dd:%s]+$") if prefix and last_bid then if last_bid:sub(-1) == "*" then return links end
local bid_start = #prefix + 1 local bid_stop = bid_start + #last_bid - 1 local next_bid = market_next_bid_amount(last_bid, row.listing_type) local command = string.format( "lbid %s %s%s", row.num, tostring(next_bid), requires_confirm(row.listing_type, last_bid) and " confirm" or "" )
table.insert( links, { start = bid_start, stop = bid_stop, text = string.format('market_send_bid(%q, %q, %q)', row.num, last_bid, row.listing_type), label = "Bid " .. format_amount(next_bid) .. " on item " .. row.num .. " (" .. command .. ")", } ) end
return links end
local function add_refresh_menu(window, handler) table.insert(window.menu_table, "-") table.insert(window.menu_table, "Refresh") table.insert(window.menu_handlers, handler) end
local function sorted_market_rows() local rows = {} for _, row in pairs(market_plugin.rows_by_num or {}) do table.insert(rows, row) end
table.sort( rows, function(a, b) return tonumber(a.num) < tonumber(b.num) end )
return rows end
local function report_mybids() local winning_rows = {} for _, row in ipairs(sorted_market_rows()) do if (row.last_bid or ""):sub(-1) == "*" then table.insert(winning_rows, row) end end
if #winning_rows == 0 then ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "You are not currently the highest bidder on any cached market items.") return end
ColourNote("lightgreen", "", string.format("Current winning market bids: %d", #winning_rows)) for _, row in ipairs(winning_rows) do local clean_bid = format_amount(clean_amount(row.last_bid) or 0) local summary = string.format( "#%s %s [%s] bid %s bids %s time %s", row.num, row.description, row.listing_type, clean_bid, row.bids, row.time_left ) Hyperlink( "lbid " .. row.num, summary, "Open market item " .. row.num, "lightblue", "", false ) end end
local function ensure_list_window() if market_plugin.list_window and market_plugin.list_window.id then market_plugin.list_window:clear(false) return market_plugin.list_window end
local win = ThemedTextWindow( GetPluginID() .. "_market_list", 100, 80, 900, 650, market_plugin.list_title, "center", true, true, true, true, true, false, false, nil, nil, GetAlphaOption("output_font_name"), GetOption("output_font_height"), 5000, 6, true )
add_refresh_menu( win, function() market_capture_list(market_plugin.last_list_command or "lbid") end )
market_plugin.list_window = win return win end
local function ensure_detail_window(item_num) if market_plugin.detail_window and market_plugin.detail_window.id then market_plugin.detail_window:clear(false) market_plugin.detail_window:dress_window(market_plugin.detail_title .. " #" .. item_num) return market_plugin.detail_window end
local win = ThemedTextWindow( GetPluginID() .. "_market_detail", 160, 120, 760, 520, market_plugin.detail_title .. " #" .. item_num, "center", true, true, true, true, true, false, false, nil, nil, GetAlphaOption("output_font_name"), GetOption("output_font_height"), 3000, 6, true )
add_refresh_menu( win, function() if market_plugin.current_detail_num then market_capture_detail(market_plugin.current_detail_num) end end )
table.insert(win.menu_table, "Bid Next Tier") table.insert( win.menu_handlers, function() local row = market_plugin.rows_by_num[market_plugin.current_detail_num or ""] if row then if row.last_bid:sub(-1) == "*" then ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "You are already the current high bidder on this item.") else market_send_bid(row.num, row.last_bid, row.listing_type) end else ColourNote("white", "red", "No cached list row for this item yet. Refresh the list first.") end end )
market_plugin.detail_window = win return win end
function process_market_list(window_styles, start_line, end_line) market_plugin.rows_by_num = {}
local win = ensure_list_window() local intro_added = false
for _, styles in ipairs(window_styles or {}) do local raw = strip_colours_from_styles(styles or {}) local trimmed = trim(raw) local row = parse_market_row(raw)
if row then market_plugin.rows_by_num[row.num] = row win:add_text(styles, false, build_row_hyperlinks(raw, row)) elseif trimmed ~= "" then if not intro_added and trimmed == "Num Item Description Lvl Type Last Bid Bids Time Left" then win:add_text("@WClick an item number for details. Click a last bid value to bid the next tier.", false) intro_added = true end win:add_text(styles, false) end end
win:fit_contents(GetInfo(281) - 30, GetInfo(280) - 80) win:set_scroll(1) win:show() win:bring_to_front()
if market_plugin.pending_after_list then local callback = market_plugin.pending_after_list market_plugin.pending_after_list = nil callback() end end
function process_market_detail(window_styles, start_line, end_line) local item_num = market_plugin.current_detail_num or "?" local win = ensure_detail_window(item_num)
for _, styles in ipairs(window_styles or {}) do local trimmed = line_text(styles) if trimmed ~= "" then win:add_text(styles, false) end end
win:add_text("@W", false) local row = market_plugin.rows_by_num[item_num] if row then if row.last_bid:sub(-1) == "*" then win:add_text("@GYou are already the current high bidder on this item.", false) else local next_bid = market_next_bid_amount(row.last_bid, row.listing_type) win:add_text( string.format("@WNext bid tier from cached market list: @G%s", format_amount(next_bid)), false ) end end
win:fit_contents(GetInfo(281) - 50, GetInfo(280) - 90) win:set_scroll(1) win:show() win:bring_to_front() end
function market_capture_list(command) if not ensure_capture_available() then return end
market_plugin.last_list_command = command or "lbid" Capture.command( market_plugin.last_list_command, market_plugin.list_start_pattern, market_plugin.list_end_pattern, true, false, true, false, process_market_list ) end
function market_capture_detail(item_num) if not ensure_capture_available() then return end
market_plugin.current_detail_num = tostring(item_num) Capture.command( "lbid " .. tostring(item_num), market_plugin.detail_start_pattern, market_plugin.detail_end_pattern, true, false, true, false, process_market_detail ) end
function market_send_bid(item_num, last_bid_text, listing_type) if (last_bid_text or ""):sub(-1) == "*" then ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "You are already the current high bidder on this item.") return end
local next_bid = market_next_bid_amount(last_bid_text, listing_type) local command = string.format( "lbid %s %s%s", tostring(item_num), tostring(next_bid), requires_confirm(listing_type, last_bid_text) and " confirm" or "" )
Execute(command) ColourNote( "paleturquoise", "", string.format("Marketplace bid command sent: %s", command) ) end
function market_refresh() if market_plugin.detail_window and market_plugin.detail_window.id and market_plugin.current_detail_num then market_capture_detail(market_plugin.current_detail_num) return end
market_capture_list(market_plugin.last_list_command or "lbid") end
function market_show_mybids() market_plugin.pending_after_list = report_mybids market_capture_list("lbid") end
function OnPluginDisable() if market_plugin.list_window and market_plugin.list_window.id then market_plugin.list_window:delete() market_plugin.list_window = nil end
if market_plugin.detail_window and market_plugin.detail_window.id then market_plugin.detail_window:delete() market_plugin.detail_window = nil end end
